summary: Frontend re-validation of nav logout button + register role options + SentReportsDashboard auto-reminder modal end-to-end. All 7 critical test scenarios PASS. (1) Landing /, logged out: only nav-login visible, no nav-logout/nav-dashboard. (2) /register: only register-role-client and register-role-specialist present; no operator/admin role buttons. (3) Login as specialist@propmanage.io and admin@propmanage.io both succeed and route to /<role>. (4) Landing /, logged in (admin): nav-admin + nav-dashboard + nav-logout all visible; nav-login NOT present. (5) GET DT page at /digital-twin (NOT /<role>/digital-twin) — 'Răspunsuri' button (data-testid=dt-sent-reports-btn) visible with badge counter. Opening it mounts SentReportsDashboard cleanly — 3 pending report rows rendered (project DE Demo Test → Mihai Ionescu) without React errors. (6) Click settings-{report_id} gear icon → auto-reminder-settings-modal opens with ALL 5 expected controls (auto-reminder-enabled, auto-reminder-thresholds prefilled '5, 10, 30', auto-reminder-pause-until prefilled 2027-03-15, auto-reminder-stopped, auto-reminder-save). 'Reluare după 15.03.2027' next-due hint + 'Praguri trimise deja: 3d, 7d' history visible. Click Salvează → toast 'Setări auto-reminder salvate' appears, modal closes, list refreshes without crash. (7) Click nav-logout from landing → page reloads to /, nav-login reappears, nav-logout/nav-dashboard disappear.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js L1450: DigitalTwinPage route is mounted at /digital-twin (NOT /<role>/digital-twin as the review_request hint suggested). The main-agent context note should be updated to reflect actual route. Functionality is fine.

App.js L44-47 handleLogout: uses window.location.href='/' (full reload) after logout() — works but causes a flash. Could use react-router navigate('/') for SPA-style smoother UX, but acceptable as-is.
Nav L91: `user && user !== false` is defensive against AuthProvider's tri-state (null=loading, false=guest, object=authenticated). Good — prevents flicker before auth resolves.

AutoReminderSettingsModal L176: master toggle is checked={enabled && !stopped} and clicking it auto-clears stopped. Good UX (mutual exclusivity). The 'Stop forever' checkbox stays at the bottom for explicit kill switch.

Pause-until uses native <input type='date'> rather than shadcn Calendar — same as flagged in iteration_27. Native picker is functional but inconsistent with rest of app's calendar styling. Low priority polish.

SentReportsDashboard L462 settings button is only rendered when approval_status==='pending' AND approval_url is set — correct gating, matches scheduler skip rule for legacy reports without approval_url.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used 3 pre-existing pending reports on project 'DE Demo Test' (recipient Mihai Ionescu) already in DB from iteration 27. One of them carries pause-until=2027-03-15 + thresholds=[5,10,30] + fired=[3,7] from prior tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Route for DigitalTwinPage is /digital-twin (top-level, NOT under /<role>/). When testing the DT page, navigate directly to /digital-twin after login. TutorialOverlay may show on first specialist/client login — admin path is free of it. The 'Răspunsuri' button data-testid is dt-sent-reports-btn (with optional dt-sent-reports-badge child for pending count). SentReportsDashboard mounts in fullscreen overlay inside DigitalTwinPage (line 398-409). Three TEST_AutoReminder pending reports remain in DB under project 'DE Demo Test' for further smoke tests.
rca of the issue: No issues. All review_request acceptance criteria (1) nav logout button, (2) register role restriction, (3) SentReportsDashboard render, (4) AutoReminderSettingsModal data-testids + save flow, (5) backend smoke (deferred — backend already validated in iter 27 with 19/19 pytest) verified passing on the live preview URL.
